packages.rationale: Sovereign rail. Money path. Untested surface concentrated in @solana/web3.js boundary (sendUsdc, sendUsdcBatch, getTransaction inside Web3JsRpcAdapter) and SolanaMemoSubmitter batch/revocation paths. Close by adding integration tests against the SolanaRpcAdapter interface with a fake RPC, then raise the thresholds in vitest.config.ts.
